title: Drafts management hook with mock data implementation
purpose: Provides hooks for fetching and managing draft data for topics, including draft lists and individual draft details with diff calculations.
module_context: Exports two hooks: useDrafts for fetching a list of drafts and useDraft for fetching a specific draft with diff information. Uses mock data for development purposes.

steps.content: Initialize state for drafts list, loading, and error.
Define async function to fetch drafts from mock data.
Set loading state to true before fetching.
Simulate API delay with timeout.
Transform mock draft data into simplified list format.
Update drafts state with fetched data.
Handle errors during fetch by setting error state.
Set loading state to false after fetch completes.
Fetch drafts on component mount.
Return drafts list, loading state, error, and refresh function.
Set loading state to true before fetching.
Clear any existing error state.
Simulate API delay with timeout.
Transform mock draft data into simplified list format.
Update drafts state with fetched data.
Handle errors during fetch by setting error state.
Set loading state to false after fetch completes.
Invoke the fetch drafts function to refresh the list.
Initialize state for draft data, diff, loading, and error.
Define async function to fetch a specific draft from mock data.
IF topic name is empty, clear draft and diff state and set loading to false.
Set loading state to true before fetching.
Simulate API delay with timeout.
Look up draft data for the specified topic.
IF draft data is not found, clear draft and diff state and set loading to false.
Update draft state with fetched data.
Calculate diff statistics between current and draft documents.
Update diff state with calculated statistics.
Handle errors during fetch by setting error state.
Set loading state to false after fetch completes.
Fetch draft on component mount or topic name change.
Return draft data, diff, loading state, error, and action functions.
IF topic name is empty, clear draft and diff state and set loading to false.
Set loading state to true before fetching.
Simulate API delay with timeout.
Look up draft data for the specified topic.
IF draft data is not found, clear draft and diff state and set loading to false.
Update draft state with fetched data.
Calculate diff statistics between current and draft documents.
Update diff state with calculated statistics.
Handle errors during fetch by setting error state.
Set loading state to false after fetch completes.
IF no draft is loaded, return early.
Simulate API delay with timeout.
Log approval action with approver name.
Clear draft and diff state after successful approval.
Handle errors during approval by setting error state.
IF no draft is loaded, return early.
Simulate API delay with timeout.
Log rejection action with rejector name and optional reason.
Clear draft and diff state after successful rejection.
Handle errors during rejection by setting error state.

methods.name: calculateDiffStats
methods.normalized_params: (current: string, draft: string): { additions: number; deletions: number }

steps.content: Split current document into lines.
Split draft document into lines.
Create sets of trimmed lines for current and draft documents.
Count lines in draft that are not present in current as additions.
Count lines in current that are not present in draft as deletions.
Return calculated additions and deletions counts.
